category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Pakistan market (PSQCA conformity assessment, PS respirator standard adopting EN 149, occupational labour-law framework, importer obligations; medical masks via DRAP).

title.en: China-to-Pakistan PPE Respirator (FFP / KN95) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入巴基斯坦（PSQCA）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入巴基斯坦（PSQCA）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Pakistan market requirements under the Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) Act 1996, the Conformity Assessment Scheme, Pakistan Standards (PS) adopting EN 149, the occupational health and safety / labour-law framework, in-country importer obligations, and the separate medical-mask pathway through the Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan (DRAP).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与巴基斯坦市场要求对照，涵盖巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）1996年法案、合格评定方案、采用EN 149的巴基斯坦标准（PS）、职业健康安全与劳动法框架、在地进口商义务，以及经巴基斯坦药品监管局（DRAP）的独立医用口罩路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與巴基斯坦市場要求對照，涵蓋巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）1996年法案、合格評定方案、採用EN 149的巴基斯坦標準（PS）、職業健康安全與勞動法框架、在地進口商義務，以及經巴基斯坦藥品監管局（DRAP）的獨立醫用口罩路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify the current PSQCA Conformity Assessment list, applicable Pakistan Standards (PS), DRAP medical-device requirements, provincial occupational health and safety / labour law, and customs practice with qualified Pakistani regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的巴基斯坦法规专业人士核验现行PSQCA合格评定清单、适用的巴基斯坦标准（PS）、DRAP医疗器械要求、各省职业健康安全与劳动法及海关实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的巴基斯坦法規專業人士核驗現行PSQCA合格評定清單、適用的巴基斯坦標準（PS）、DRAP醫療器械要求、各省職業健康安全與勞動法及海關實踐。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators entering Pakistan are governed primarily by the Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA), which administers Pakistan Standards (PS) and a Conformity Assessment Scheme for items on its mandatory list. Pakistan's respirator standard adopts the EN 149 filtering-facepiece performance benchmark, so a Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test report does not automatically satisfy the PS/EN 149 specification. Occupational use sits within the provincial labour-law / factories-act framework rather than a single EU-style horizontal PPE regulation. Importation requires an in-country importer of record. Medical / surgical masks follow a separate route through the Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan (DRAP), not PSQCA. Pakistan does NOT operate EU-style horizontal regimes such as RoHS, a battery regulation, or an outdoor-noise directive for this product.
answer_first.zh: 进入巴基斯坦的过滤式呼吸器主要由巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）监管，PSQCA管理巴基斯坦标准（PS）并对其强制清单内的产品实施合格评定方案。巴基斯坦呼吸器标准采用EN 149过滤式半面罩性能基准，因此中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不自动满足PS/EN 149规格。职业使用归属于各省劳动法/工厂法框架，而非单一的欧盟式横向PPE法规。进口须有在地进口商作为责任主体。医用/外科口罩走经巴基斯坦药品监管局（DRAP）的独立路径，而非PSQCA。巴基斯坦对此产品不实施欧盟式横向制度，如RoHS、电池法规或户外噪声指令。
answer_first.zht: 進入巴基斯坦的過濾式呼吸器主要由巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）監管，PSQCA管理巴基斯坦標準（PS）並對其強制清單內的產品實施合格評定方案。巴基斯坦呼吸器標準採用EN 149過濾式半面罩性能基準，因此中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不自動滿足PS/EN 149規格。職業使用歸屬於各省勞動法/工廠法框架，而非單一的歐盟式橫向PPE法規。進口須有在地進口商作為責任主體。醫用/外科口罩走經巴基斯坦藥品監管局（DRAP）的獨立路徑，而非PSQCA。巴基斯坦對此產品不實施歐盟式橫向制度，如RoHS、電池法規或戶外噪聲指令。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Sources should prefer the official PSQCA, DRAP, Pakistan Ministry of Commerce / FBR, or primary legal text. Local PDFs are not accepted. human_reviewed cannot be set true until a named reviewer verifies each row's PS designation and PSQCA Conformity Assessment list status.
